tasks.label: Run Current Java File
tasks.command: chcp 65001; Get-ChildItem -Path "${workspaceFolder}" -Recurse -Filter *.class -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; $javaFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path "${fileDirname}" -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp "${fileDirname}" -d "${fileDirname}" $javaFiles; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { java "-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8" -cp "${fileDirname}" "${fileBasenameNoExtension}" }

tasks.label: Compile Current Java File
tasks.command: chcp 65001; Get-ChildItem -Path "${workspaceFolder}" -Recurse -Filter *.class -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; $javaFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path "${fileDirname}" -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp "${fileDirname}" -d "${fileDirname}" $javaFiles
